title: Mercurius review output
description: structured assessment returned by a reviewer for one Mercurius round

verdict.description: headline judgment for the whole review round

summary.description: one-paragraph high-level assessment of the artifacts

concerns.description: blocking problems, omissions, or contradictions that prevent readiness under the stated constraints

id.description: stable identifier for this concern within the round

location.description: document and section reference, or N/A when no concrete location applies

claim.description: what the reviewer believes is wrong or missing

rationale.description: why the claim matters for implementation readiness

suggestion.description: nullable concrete fix; use null when there is no suggestion

questions.description: clarifications the reviewer needs before forming a position

id.description: stable identifier for this question within the round

why_it_blocks.description: what the reviewer cannot decide without an answer

advisory_notes.description: non-blocking polish opportunities or downstream considerations that should not block readiness

id.description: stable identifier for this advisory note within the round

location.description: document and section reference, or N/A when no concrete location applies

note.description: the non-blocking polish opportunity or downstream consideration

rationale.description: why the note may be useful despite not blocking readiness

suggestion.description: nullable concrete improvement; use null when there is no suggestion
